overview: A four-color ramp strategy that leverages mana dorks like Formidable Speaker and Ashling, Rekindled to accelerate into game-winning spells. Omniscience serves as the primary engine, allowing you to cast multiple threats or answers without paying mana. The deck aims to outvalue opponents by generating massive mana advantages and closing games with efficient, untapped threats.
win_conditions: Casting multiple threats for free via Omniscience

keep_criteria: Hands with early mana dorks and land drops
Hands containing Omniscience with follow-up spells
Hands with interactive removal or ramp
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking ramp or mana acceleration
Hands with too many lands and no threats
Hands missing Omniscience or key finishers

early_game: Play lands and mana dorks on curve
Establish early board presence with Speaker
Prioritize land drops over early spells
mid_game: Cast Omniscience when you have multiple spells ready
Follow up with threats and answers simultaneously
Use Ashling to generate extra mana or untap lands
late_game: Flood the board with untapped creatures
Close out games with efficient, high-impact threats
Maintain mana advantage to outvalue opponents

key_cards.name: Formidable Speaker
key_cards.role: Mana dork and early board presence
key_cards.notes: Play on curve to accelerate into turn 3-4 spells; can block or attack to apply pressure.

key_cards.name: Omniscience
key_cards.notes: Cast when you have multiple spells ready; prioritize threats followed by answers or more ramp.

key_cards.name: Ashling, Rekindled
key_cards.role: Secondary mana dork and card advantage
key_cards.notes: Use to untap lands or generate extra mana; synergizes with Omniscience for massive turns.

sequencing_tips: Hold up mana for counterspells if needed, but prioritize casting Omniscience when you have a clear follow-up
Play mana dorks before casting Omniscience to maximize free spells
Save removal for opponent's key threats

matchups.advice: Play dorks early, use Omniscience to cast multiple blockers or a big threat
Ramp past their early game, use Omniscience to cast threats and answers simultaneously
Outvalue them with mana advantage, close quickly with untapped threats
